title: Data Manifest
description: Schema for data/manifest.json — auto-generated index of all data files with a freshness timestamp.

generated.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when this manifest was last regenerated.

files.description: Index of data files. May be an array of path strings (legacy) or an object keyed by relative path with per-file metadata (current format).

file_count.description: Total count of files listed (may be absent in older manifests).
